Paterson Resources ( (AU:PSL) ) has issued an announcement.

data.title: Zonetail Switches Auditor to Jones O’Connell in Cost-Driven Move
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Zonetail ( (TSE:ZONE) ) has shared an announcement.

Zonetail Inc. has changed its auditor, appointing Jones O’Connell LLP as its new external auditor effective January 19, 2026, replacing MNP LLP primarily for cost-related reasons and with the appointment set to run until the next annual general meeting. The company reported no modified opinions in the former auditor’s reports for the past two financial years, indicated there were no reportable events associated with the transition, and confirmed that the change of auditor documentation has been reviewed by its audit committee and board and filed on SEDAR, suggesting a routine governance adjustment rather than a sign of financial or operational stress.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:ZONE) stock is a Sell with a C$0.01 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Zonetail stock, see the TSE:ZONE Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on TSE:ZONE Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, TSE:ZONE is a Neutral.

The score is weighed down primarily by very weak financial performance (shrinking revenue, negative gross profit, ongoing losses, cash burn, and negative equity). Technicals also remain unfavorable with a clear downtrend, partially offset by oversold signals. Corporate events provide a modest positive offset via financing and product/partnership momentum, while valuation offers limited support due to a negative P/E and no dividend yield.

To see Spark’s full report on TSE:ZONE stock, click here.

More about Zonetail

Zonetail Inc. (TSXV: ZONE) is a Toronto-based provider of a mobile platform and market network focused on high-rise residential buildings, helping residents manage their homes by connecting them with products, amenities, and services. The company aims to build critical mass in the hard-to-reach high-rise residential vertical through a mobile market network model that delivers relevant information and home-related services via a smartphone interface.

Average Trading Volume: 67,664

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: C$4.21M

Learn more about ZONE stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: K2 Gold Seeks Up to C$15 Million to Advance Mojave and Si2 Projects
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

The latest update is out from K2 Gold ( (TSE:KTO) ).

K2 Gold Corporation has launched a non-brokered private placement of up to 21.43 million common shares at C$0.70 per share to raise as much as C$15 million, using a listed issuer financing exemption in most Canadian jurisdictions outside Quebec. The company plans to direct the net proceeds toward exploration work at its Mojave and Si2 gold projects and for general corporate purposes, a move that could accelerate drilling and de-risk its U.S. exploration portfolio, subject to customary regulatory and stock exchange approvals.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:KTO) stock is a Hold with a C$0.75 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on K2 Gold stock, see the TSE:KTO Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on TSE:KTO Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, TSE:KTO is a Neutral.

The score is driven by strong technical momentum and favorable corporate de-risking/permitting progress, but capped by weak financial performance (no revenue, persistent losses and cash burn) and limited valuation support due to a negative P/E and no dividend.

To see Spark’s full report on TSE:KTO stock, click here.

More about K2 Gold

K2 Gold Corporation is a Vancouver-based mineral exploration company focused on advancing gold projects in the western United States. Led by a management team with a track record of more than $2.6 billion in completed gold transactions, including the sales of Great Bear Resources and Kaminak Gold, K2 is part of the Discovery Group, an alliance credited with discoveries exceeding 10 million ounces of gold. Its key assets include the Mojave oxide gold project in California, which hosts multiple drilled surface gold targets, and the Si2 epithermal gold project in Nevada’s Walker Lane Trend, where recent work has outlined priority structural targets that have yet to be fully tested.

Average Trading Volume: 286,889

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: C$133.6M

data.title: Kyokuto Securities Posts Higher Revenue and Profit but Lower Net Income for Nine-Month Period
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

The latest update is out from Kyokuto Securities Co ( (JP:8706) ).

For the nine months ended December 31, 2025, Kyokuto Securities reported modest growth in operating revenue to ¥6,613 million and net operating revenue to ¥6,528 million, both up around 1% year on year, while operating profit rose 8.7% to ¥2,742 million and ordinary profit increased 6.1% to ¥3,556 million. Profit attributable to owners of parent declined 6.7% to ¥4,003 million and basic earnings per share fell to ¥125.48, even as comprehensive income surged and the company’s financial position strengthened, with total assets rising to ¥84,046 million and equity increasing to ¥53,304 million, resulting in a solid equity-to-asset ratio of 63.4%. Kyokuto maintained its dividend stance with an interim dividend of ¥50 per share for the fiscal year ending March 31, 2026, in line with the prior year’s pattern, and continued its policy of not disclosing full-year earnings forecasts, leaving investors to infer future performance from its stable capital base and earnings resilience despite the recent dip in bottom-line profit.

More about Kyokuto Securities Co

Kyokuto Securities Co., Ltd. is a Japan-based securities firm listed on the Tokyo Stock Exchange, operating in the financial services industry. The company provides securities brokerage and related investment services, generating operating and net operating revenue primarily from securities transactions and associated financial activities for its client base.

Average Trading Volume: 149,147

Current Market Cap: Yen54.65B

See more data about 8706 stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Maxus Mining Commissions VTEM Airborne Survey to Advance B.C. Exploration Portfolio
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Maxus Mining, Inc. ( (TSE:MAXM) ) has issued an announcement.

Maxus Mining Inc. has hired Geotech Ltd. to carry out a large-scale, multi-block airborne geophysical survey over its Alturas, Hurley, Lotto, and Quarry mineral projects in British Columbia during winter 2026, using Geotech’s VTEM helicopter-borne time-domain electromagnetic and magnetic system to cover roughly 1,417 line-kilometres. The program is intended to map subsurface resistivity and magnetic contrasts to better understand shear-, sediment- and intrusion-hosted mineral systems at depths of 300–500 metres, sharpen exploration targets, and guide future drilling, with Convolutions Geoscience overseeing QA/QC; the initiative marks a key technical step in systematically advancing Maxus’s British Columbia portfolio and could enhance the efficiency and focus of its exploration efforts across multiple properties.

More about Maxus Mining, Inc.

Maxus Mining Inc. is a mineral exploration company focused on locating, acquiring, and potentially advancing economic mineral properties in premier jurisdictions, with an active portfolio of approximately 15,098 hectares of prospective ground in British Columbia, Canada. Its assets include 8,920 hectares across three antimony projects led by the flagship Alturas Antimony Project, plus the Hurley and Quarry Antimony Projects with nearby or historical polymetallic gold‑antimony‑base metal results, and the 3,054-hectare Lotto Tungsten Project.

Average Trading Volume: 207,999

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

For a thorough assessment of MAXM stock, go to TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Pioneer Minerals Secures Idaho District and Raises Capital to Accelerate US Critical Minerals Push
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

An update from Pioneer Lithium Limited ( (AU:PMM) ) is now available.

In its December 2025 quarterly report, Pioneer Minerals announced district-scale consolidation at the North Pine Antimony–Tungsten–Gold Project in Idaho, securing a prospective land package near Perpetua Resources’ Stibnite Gold Project and completing a maiden field program that returned high-grade tungsten skarn mineralisation up to 2.98% WO₃ and gold up to 7.75 g/t, along with multiple independent mineral systems and a new polymetallic precious-metal system at Silver Cliffs. The company also advanced early-stage uranium targeting at its Central Buttes (Wyoming) and Skull Creek (Colorado) projects, completed magnetic and radiometric surveys, and subsequently secured firm commitments to raise $1 million to fund accelerated exploration across its US critical minerals portfolio, underscoring a strategic shift to a focused suite of tungsten, antimony and uranium assets and signalling potential value creation for shareholders through resource discovery in key critical minerals markets.

More about Pioneer Lithium Limited

Pioneer Minerals Limited is an ASX-listed exploration company focused on a United States critical minerals portfolio, targeting tungsten, antimony, gold and uranium. The company is concentrating its efforts on district-scale opportunities in Idaho, Wyoming and Colorado, positioning itself around established and emerging projects in key North American mining jurisdictions.

Average Trading Volume: 74,881

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

See more data about PMM stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.
